nodes.x: The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.

Thus saith the Lord God; Behold, I am against the shepherds; and I will require my flock at their hand, and cause them to cease from feeding the flock; neither shall the shepherds feed themselves any more; for I will deliver my flock from their mouth, that they may not be meat for them.
And I will set up shepherds over them which shall feed them: and they shall fear no more, nor be dismayed, neither shall they be lacking, saith the Lord.
¶ And the Lord said unto me, Take unto thee yet the instruments of a foolish shepherd.
¶ Therefore, ye shepherds, hear the word of the Lord;
And I will set up one shepherd over them, and he shall feed them, even my servant David; he shall feed them, and he shall be their shepherd.
He maketh me to lie down in green pastures: he leadeth me beside the still waters.
He watereth the hills from his chambers: the earth is satisfied with the fruit of thy works.
The range of the mountains is his pasture, and he searcheth after every green thing.
He hath filled me with his love, even unto the consuming of my flesh.
Then brought he me out of the way of the gate northward, and led me about the way without unto the utter gate by the way that looketh eastward; and, behold, there ran out waters on the right side.
He restoreth my soul: he leadeth me in the paths of righteousness for his name’s sake.
He restoreth my soul: he leadeth me in the paths of righteousness for his name’s sake.
He that followeth after righteousness and mercy findeth life, righteousness, and honour.
He that walketh uprightly, and worketh righteousness, and speaketh the truth in his heart.
The highway of the upright is to depart from evil: he that keepeth his way preserveth his soul.
Restore unto me the joy of thy salvation; and uphold me with thy free spirit.

And thus he shall bring salvation to all those who shall believe on his name; this being the intent of this last sacrifice, to bring about the bowels of mercy, which overpowereth justice, and bringeth about means unto men that they may have faith unto repentance.
Yea, though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil: for thou art with me; thy rod and thy staff they comfort me.
But as for thee and thy servants, I know that ye will not yet fear the Lord God.
Behold, my terror shall not make thee afraid, neither shall my hand be heavy upon thee.

But, brethren, we shall continne to offer further reflections in our next Epistle. You will learn by the time you have read this, and if you do not learn it, you may learn it, that walls and irons, doors and crocking hinges, and half scared to death guards and jailers, grinning like some damned spirits, lest an innocent man should make his escape to bring to light the damnable deeds of a…
I will send my fear before thee, and will destroy all the people to whom thou shalt come, and I will make all thine enemies turn their backs unto thee.

Behold now, thy servant hath found grace in thy sight, and thou hast magnified thy mercy, which thou hast shewed unto me in saving my life; and I cannot escape to the mountain, lest some evil take me, and I die:
Thou preparest a table before me in the presence of mine enemies: thou anointest my head with oil; my cup runneth over.
But thou, when thou fastest, anoint thine head, and wash thy face;
But thou, when thou fastest, anoint thy head, and wash thy face;
¶ When thou goest forth to war against thine enemies, and the Lord thy God hath delivered them into thine hands, and thou hast taken them captive,
Then shalt thou take the anointing oil, and pour it upon his head, and anoint him.
Thou hast beset me behind and before, and laid thine hand upon me.
Surely goodness and mercy shall follow me all the days of my life: and I will dwell in the house of the Lord for ever.
While I live will I praise the Lord: I will sing praises unto my God while I have any being.
. May grace, mercy, and peace, from God our Father, and from the Lord Jesus Christ, rest upon you all from this time, henceforth, and forever. Amen.
Keep yourselves in the love of God, looking for the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ unto eternal life.
Thy mercy, O Lord, is in the heavens; and thy faithfulness reacheth unto the clouds.
